content_body:
What a great trip we had! This is the sixth time we've visited the area and this is by far our favorite place to stay The house and lake are wonderful! Even though it rained most of the time, we rented a pontoon boat (on a rainy day), cruised the lake, swam, and fished. We went to Blue Ridge shops, went to Mercier's and bought great apple pies, enjoyed the hot tub, grilled and ate a lot! We even saw our next-door neighbor from home in Blue Ridge! It's obviously THE place to be! Thank you for opening up your home. We have had a great time.
GA
title: Blue Ridge GA is THE Place to be!
